chunks:
# DigitalOcean App Platform Configuration
# IVD MCP Server — standalone MCP server for Intent-Verified Development
#
# Deploy: doctl apps create --spec .do/app.yaml --project-id <project_id>
# Update: doctl apps update <app_id> --spec .do/app.yaml

name: ivd-mcp
region: sfo

# CRITICAL: Disable DO edge cache — SSE streams require unbuffered responses.
# Without this, the Cloudflare edge cache buffers SSE events and clients receive 0 bytes.
disable_edge_cache: true

services:
- name: ivd-mcp
  source_dir: /
  github:
    repo: leocelis/ivd
    branch: main
    deploy_on_push: true

  environment_slug: python
  instance_count: 1
  instance_size_slug: apps-s-1vcpu-0.5gb  # $5/month, 512MB RAM

  # IVD MCP Server (SSE transport)
  run_command: "python wsgi.py --port 8080"
  http_port: 8080

  routes:
  - path: /

  envs:
  # API keys for authenticated access (comma-separated)
  # Set the actual value in DO dashboard (Settings > Environment Variables)
  # DO NOT put real keys in this file — it's committed to git
  - key: IVD_API_KEYS
    value: "CHANGE_ME_IN_DO_DASHBOARD"
    type: SECRET

domains:
- domain: mcp.ivdframework.dev
  type: PRIMARY

alerts:
- rule: DEPLOYMENT_FAILED
- rule: DOMAIN_FAILED
